programme.desc: As everyone begins unboxing their phones, they realise they've been given toy phones instead of real ones. Just as Jethalal celebrates his win, how will the furious customers react?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As the crowd attempts to forcibly enter Gada Electronics, Jethalal swiftly closes the shutter to protect himself. Meanwhile, Inspector Pandey prepares to arrest him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham members follow a kite, reminiscing about their childhood memories. Subsequently, Rupa and the children opt to travel to Jaipur for the Patang Utsav.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham men are thrilled about Popatlal's trip to Jaipur. Later, Popatlal brings out his special kite, only for Veer and Bansri to tear it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham Society explores Jaipur while Popatlal buys a kite for the challenge. Elsewhere, the men of Gokuldham Society anticipate the day of the contest.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham members have a vibrant evening in Jaipur. Subsequently, Popatlal prepares for his highly anticipated showdown with Babli.

programme.title: Yashomati Maiyya Ke Nandlala
programme.desc: Kansa learns about a mysterious child in the nearby villages and sends his soldiers to find the child. After a while, Kansa's soldiers terrorise the villagers.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: During his morning walk, Champaklal's friends propose a potential match for Tapu. Raja Mastana calls Tapu.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide discovers that Tapu and Sonu have tricked him and Champaklal. Later, he takes Raja Mastana's number from Abdul and plans to teach Raja Mastana a lesson.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Madhavi and Bhide prepare elaborately to meet Raja Mastana. Tapu and Sonu face unexpected consequences of this meeting.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide invites Raja Mastana to Gokuldham and reveals to Champaklal that he has a surprise for the guest.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and Sonu learn that Bhide has invited Raja Mastana to the Gokuldham society. Bhide surprises Champaklal with an announcement.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Disappointed with Sonu for her decision, Bhide and Madhavi lash out at her. Sonu becomes frustrated and calls Tapu to come help her out.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sonu rejects all the matches that Joshi Kaka brings for her. Kanji Kaka presents Tapu with a few potential matches.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Madhavi and Sonu head to the parlour, the Mahila Mandal members rush to catch them. Bhide informs Champaklal that the groom's family are coming.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sonu feels emotional about leaving the society after her marriage. Later, she and Tapu meet and express their sadness together.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sonu has a dream where the family of the groom chosen for her approves of her. In a panic, she calls Tapu for help.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu tells Sonu that they should run away from their families and marry each other. In order to set his plan into motion, he enlists the help of his friends.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu's friends prepare to carry out his plan, but they run into some obstacles. When Sonu tries to leave her house, Bhide stands guard and blocks her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu consoles Sonu when she feels bad for deceiving her father. Bhide tells Jethalal that Tapu and Sonu have gone missing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone tries to search for Tapu and his friends, but they are nowhere to be found. Tapu and Sonu prepare for their marriage.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham members search for Tapu and Sonu, while Tapu comforts Sonu, assuring her about their decision.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide goes to the police station to file a complaint against Tapu. The other members of Gokuldham society are invited home by Tapu and Sonu.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Mahila Mandal stop Jethalal and Bhide from entering Gokuldham. Tapu and Sonu call everyone and reveal the truth behind everything.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal feels flattered when Babita compliments his clothes. Bhide unintentionally ruins Jethalal's shirt, making him furious.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal receives a call from Sharmili, who accuses him of swindling her out of 10,000 rupees with false promises of an acting role.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal feels crushed when Babita doesn't appear at his store and decides to vent his frustrations to Taarak.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is in a bad mood throughout the day and gets into a dispute with Champaklal. Bagha tells Jethalal what he dreamt of during a night with a full moon.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While going to check on Champaklal at night, Jethalal accidentally breaks his glasses. Champaklal asks Jethalal to wake up early in the morning to accompany him for a walk.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After enjoying an exercise session with Babita and Iyer, Jethalal finds that his house keys are missing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: On the way back home, Jethalal and Champaklal find themselves in trouble when a hungry dog chases after them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Without his glasses, Champaklal is unable to complete the simplest tasks. Atif reaches Jethalal's house with eye drops and an eye patch to help Champaklal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Despite being reluctant to assist, Bhide is forced to take care of Champaklal while Jethalal is away from home.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal reaches Jethalal's house to take care of Champaklal for a while. He offers to prepare a tea for Champaklal but soon finds that they are out of tea powder.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Champaklal is unable to read the newspaper without his spectacles, Popatlal offers to read it to him. However, Popatlal promptly leaves to cover an event.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal leaves his shop to pick up Champaklal's spectacles he dropped off to get repaired, but he soon finds out that the shop owner has tricked him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide agrees to take Champaklal out to attend his friend's birthday. However, things take a drastic turn when Champaklal goes missing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal finds himself in trouble after realising that he has been kidnapped. He defends himself when the thief tries to steal his gold chain.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal becomes angry when Bhide reluctantly tells him that Champaklal has disappeared with his scooter.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Madhavi surprises Bhide with a welcome, and they discuss Gogi's situation. Tarak tells Anjali about Gogi confidently going to his exam.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak and Jethalal discuss saving water and diet food. A mysterious car appears in their community, but no one knows the owner.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A decorated car in the Gokuldham Society surprises all the members. Iyer tells a story about the car and his love for Babita.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone is stunned at seeing an expensive car in Gokuldham. However, Iyer reveals the truth, telling the story of his and Babita's love.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal has doubts about Iyer and Babita's marriage since they are from different backgrounds, and he tries to find out how Iyer asked Babita to marry him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Maushami, a childhood friend, calls Babita after the marriage proposal and comes to visit her. Iyer talks to Babita about a significant presentation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Iyer talks to Babita on the phone, Babita forgets to hang up the call and Iyer hears the unexpected truth.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As Iyer continues to make a big deal about Jethalal's misconception, Jethalal asks Taarak Mehta for help. However, when Taarak Mehta refuses to help him, Jethalal vows to exact revenge on Iyer.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Bhide gets a swing fixed in his balcony, the plaster comes off. He informs the residents that the building would soon require repairing, but they all refuse.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After the plaster in Popatlal's balcony comes off, everybody agrees with Bhide that the building requires repairing. Bhide calls Lalita Godbole, an engineer, to inspect the building.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Lalita Godbole, an engineer, comes to inspect the building, Popatlal forces her to inspect his house first. Soon, an argument erupts in Gokuldham society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After inspecting the building, Lalita Godbole informs Bhide that the building is in dire condition and requires immediate repair. Soon, Bhide calls an urgent meeting to break this news.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Lalita Godbole presents the structural report and informs the residents that the external section of the building requires repairing. An argument between Popatlal and Bhide turns into a big fight.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal finds out about Popatlal's real problem and helps him with some money. Later, without Bhide's permission, Popatlal places an ad in the Toofan Express.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide calls a meeting to declare the name of the building contractor. However, a girl interrupts and requests Bhide to consider her contract.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sundar's company wins the repairing contractor. Later, Jethalal is shocked to uncover that Sundar started a construction company.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Sundar gets the building repair contract, Jethalal worries and reaches Taarak's house to discuss the issue. Soon, the duo visit an astrologer to find a solution.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal calls Sundar and tries to scare him by pretending to be an inspector, but Sundar recognises his voice and pranks Jethalal instead.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After the prayer rituals, the members of Gokuldham Society ask Sundar to start the renovation at the earliest.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and the entire family go to the theatre to watch the movie in which Sundar acted.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham Society's members decide to donate blankets to those in need. However, when the blankets arrive they receive a shocking surprise.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal feels enraged when the people in need resell the blankets that he donated to them. However, he eventually learns the truth behind their actions.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal learns that Champaklal took his money from the shop just before he has to pay a dealer. The police arrest Champaklal when they mistake him for a thief.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Taarak are surprised to learn that Champaklal has disappeared. Tapu explains the circumstances around him going missing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone in Gokuldham is surprised to learn that Champaklal has been arrested. The members rush to the police station to free him.

programme.desc: Prasad mentions that the children will earn a lot of money when they start working. After some time, Prasad reveals that nobody will question his decision.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: The children refuse to drink the concoction as it is bitter in comparison to the sweets. Meanwhile, Latika throws the concoction out of the window.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Contestants put their minds to solving word puzzles after spinning a giant wheel that determines the monetary value they are playing for.
